comment_content:
Absolutely sick to death of hearing our fans blaming the ref,  listen the ref I thought was OK today, let a lot of things go and rightly gave out yellows when they were deserved, you can't book people for every foul there would be nobody left on the pitch, alot of players dive especially forwards especially when there going nowhere you only have to touch them, both teams did that today
All the people complaining about refs can come and ref my U10s team Saturday and I GUARANTEE you get most things wrong, you couldnt ref a premier league game if your life depended on it,  it's embarrassing the amount of idiots that support our team who know nothing about football, 70% of the people shouting REF are blind as fuck and have zero football knowledge

We lost 2-1 and ref didn't score any of those goals, get a grip and shut the fuck up
